ops.title: Fix needs_ref propagation in recode pipeline (chain-integrity)
ops.description: inline_recode (crates/ccs-policy/src/pipeline/passes/recode.rs:67-93) always emits needs_ref: None and upsert_proposal replaces — an inline pass (D/E/A) after a ref-backed pass (F) drops the retrieval handle. Fix: RecodeLeaf.carried_ref populated by recode_leaf from the prior proposal's needs_ref; inline_recode emits it. Do NOT change stage_recode (needs_ref-as-boolean + raw payload is the GC/retrieve contract). Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 0.

ops.text: cargo test -p ccs-policy green including new inline_recode_after_ref_backed_preserves_needs_ref and chain_f_then_d_stays_ref_backed
an F-then-D chained proposal still renders a ref marker and its stored payload is the pre-F original bytes
